title: Scanner: Implement Front-Running detection plugin
body:
## Description
Create a new security detection plugin for front-running vulnerabilities in smart contracts.

## Files to Create
- `plugins/front-running/package.json`
- `plugins/front-running/tsconfig.json`
- `plugins/front-running/vitest.config.ts`
- `plugins/front-running/src/index.ts`
- `plugins/front-running/src/index.test.ts`
- `plugins/front-running/.eslintrc.js`

## Files to Modify
- `packages/scanner-core/src/plugin-registry.ts` — register the new plugin

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Plugin implements `IRulePlugin` from `@veridion/scanner-types`
- [ ] Detects transaction ordering dependency patterns
- [ ] Detects priority gas auction vulnerabilities
- [ ] Includes unit tests with 80%+ coverage
- [ ] Plugin metadata includes proper severity, chains, languages, and tags
- [ ] All tests pass with `pnpm test --filter=@veridion/plugin-front-running`
- [ ] TypeScript compilation passes

title: Scanner: Implement Timestamp Dependence detection plugin
body:
## Description
Create a security detection plugin that identifies reliance on block.timestamp for critical logic.

## Files to Create
- `plugins/timestamp/package.json`
- `plugins/timestamp/tsconfig.json`
- `plugins/timestamp/vitest.config.ts`
- `plugins/timestamp/src/index.ts`
- `plugins/timestamp/src/index.test.ts`
- `plugins/timestamp/.eslintrc.js`

## Files to Modify
- `packages/scanner-core/src/plugin-registry.ts` — register the new plugin

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Plugin implements `IRulePlugin` from `@veridion/scanner-types`
- [ ] Detects `block.timestamp` usage in conditional logic
- [ ] Detects `now` keyword usage (legacy Solidity)
- [ ] Includes unit tests with 80%+ coverage
- [ ] Plugin metadata includes `TIMESTAMP` category and `FindingSeverity.LOW`
- [ ] All tests pass and TypeScript compilation succeeds

title: Scanner: Implement Unchecked Return Value detection plugin
body:
## Description
Create a plugin that detects calls to `.send()`, `.call()`, `.transfer()` where the return value is not checked.

## Files to Create
- `plugins/unchecked-return/package.json`
- `plugins/unchecked-return/tsconfig.json`
- `plugins/unchecked-return/vitest.config.ts`
- `plugins/unchecked-return/src/index.ts`
- `plugins/unchecked-return/src/index.test.ts`
- `plugins/unchecked-return/.eslintrc.js`

## Files to Modify
- `packages/scanner-core/src/plugin-registry.ts` — register the new plugin

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Plugin implements `IRulePlugin` from `@veridion/scanner-types`
- [ ] Detects unchecked `address.call()` return values
- [ ] Detects unchecked `address.send()` return values
- [ ] Detects unchecked `address.delegatecall()` return values
- [ ] Provides fix recommendations using `require(success)` pattern
- [ ] Includes unit tests with 80%+ coverage

title: Scanner: Implement Uninitialized Storage Pointer detection plugin
body:
## Description
Create a plugin that detects uninitialized storage pointers in Solidity which can lead to unexpected storage corruption.

## Files to Create
- `plugins/storage-pointer/package.json`
- `plugins/storage-pointer/tsconfig.json`
- `plugins/storage-pointer/vitest.config.ts`
- `plugins/storage-pointer/src/index.ts`
- `plugins/storage-pointer/src/index.test.ts`
- `plugins/storage-pointer/.eslintrc.js`

## Files to Modify
- `packages/scanner-core/src/plugin-registry.ts` — register the new plugin

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Plugin implements `IRulePlugin` from `@veridion/scanner-types`
- [ ] Detects struct/array declarations in functions without explicit storage/memory keyword
- [ ] Detects assignments to storage references that may overwrite unexpected slots
- [ ] Includes unit tests with 80%+ coverage
- [ ] All tests pass and TypeScript compilation succeeds

title: Scanner: Implement Upgrade Proxy vulnerability detection plugin
body:

Create a plugin that detects common vulnerabilities in upgradeable proxy contracts.

title: Scanner: Add result deduplication to ResultAggregator
body:
## Description
The `ResultAggregator` should deduplicate findings that are reported by multiple plugins for the same code location.

## Files to Modify
- `packages/scanner-core/src/result-aggregator.ts` — add deduplication logic
- `packages/scanner-core/src/result-aggregator.test.ts` — add deduplication tests (create if missing)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Findings at the same file, line range, and category are deduplicated
- [ ] Higher-severity finding is kept when duplicates exist
- [ ] `deduplicateFindings()` method is added to `ResultAggregator`
- [ ] Summary counts reflect deduplicated results
- [ ] Unit tests cover: duplicates with same severity, different severity, different locations
- [ ] Existing tests continue to pass

title: Scanner: Add plugin configuration system with per-plugin settings
body:
## Description
Enable per-plugin configuration (e.g., severity overrides, enabled/disabled, custom thresholds) via the `PluginRegistry`.

## Files to Modify
- `packages/scanner-core/src/plugin-registry.ts` — add config support
- `packages/scanner-core/src/scanner.ts` — pass config to plugins
- `packages/scanner-types/src/index.ts` — extend `IRulePlugin` or add config types

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `PluginRegistry.register()` accepts an optional config object
- [ ] Plugin config can override severity of findings
- [ ] Plugin config can disable specific detection patterns within a plugin
- [ ] Config is validated against a schema defined in plugin metadata
- [ ] `getPluginConfig(pluginId)` method retrieves current config
- [ ] Unit tests cover config registration, retrieval, and overrides
- [ ] Backward compatible — existing plugins work without config

title: API: Implement real Soroban blockchain service integration
body:
## Description
Replace the stub implementation in `BlockchainService` with actual Stellar Soroban contract interaction using the deployed testnet contracts.

## Files to Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/blockchain/blockchain.service.ts` — implement real contract calls
- `apps/api/src/modules/blockchain/dto/blockchain.dto.ts` — update DTOs if needed
- `apps/api/src/modules/blockchain/blockchain.module.ts` — add any new providers

## New files potentially needed
- `apps/api/src/modules/blockchain/soroban-client.ts` — Soroban RPC client wrapper

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Calls `register_audit` on the deployed audit-registry contract (ID: `CDZLMOM3IPXG7FFHMVYGR3LFU6L36WQAMXGCRY2BYHSRCYRYAOVYPIWL`)
- [ ] Calls `verify_audit` on the deployed verifier contract (ID: `CBCMGBNKFABLSPUFR2D344HC6Z42C5FTLOZUTA3PCIYYE45AVD3RI5OP`)
- [ ] Uses `stellar-sdk` or `@stellar/stellar-sdk` for transaction building
- [ ] Transaction status is updated in the database after on-chain confirmation
- [ ] Handles network errors gracefully with retries
- [ ] Uses environment variables for contract IDs and network config
- [ ] Unit tests mock the Stellar SDK

title: API: Implement real AI chat service with provider integration

title: API: Add BullMQ queue system for async scan job processing
body:
## Description
Add a BullMQ-based job queue for processing scan jobs asynchronously. Currently scan jobs appear to be synchronous.

## Files to Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/audits/audits.service.ts` — enqueue scan jobs
- `apps/api/src/app.module.ts` — register BullMQ module

## Files to Create
- `apps/api/src/modules/audits/audits.processor.ts` — BullMQ job processor
- `apps/api/src/modules/audits/audits.queue.ts` — queue definition

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `POST /audits` enqueues a job instead of synchronous processing
- [ ] Job processor runs the scanner and AI analysis asynchronously
- [ ] Audit status transitions: PENDING → SCANNING → AI_REVIEW → COMPLETED
- [ ] Failed jobs are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff
- [ ] Redis connection is configured for BullMQ
- [ ] Job progress is trackable via audit status updates
- [ ] Unit and integration tests for queue flow

title: API: Add rate limiting middleware with Redis
body:
## Description
Implement rate limiting on all API endpoints using Redis-backed throttling to prevent abuse.

## Files to Create
- `apps/api/src/common/throttle/throttle.guard.ts` — rate limit guard
- `apps/api/src/common/throttle/throttle.module.ts` — module definition

## Files to Modify
- `apps/api/src/app.module.ts` — apply global rate limiting

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Default rate limit: 100 requests per minute per IP
- [ ] Higher limits for authenticated users (200/min)
- [ ] Special limits for AI endpoints (20/min)
- [ ] Uses Redis for distributed rate limiting across instances
- [ ] Returns `429 Too Many Requests` with `Retry-After` header
- [ ] Works behind reverse proxies (X-Forwarded-For)
- [ ] Configurable via environment variables
- [ ] Unit tests for rate limit logic

title: API: Implement API key management (CRUD, permissions, revocation)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `DELETE /api-keys/:id` — revoke an API key

title: Documentation: Set up Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for the API
body:
## Description
Add Swagger UI to the NestJS API for interactive API documentation.

## Files to Modify
- `apps/api/src/main.ts` — add Swagger setup
- `apps/api/package.json` — add swagger dependencies

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Swagger UI accessible at `/api/docs`
- [ ] All endpoints documented with request/response schemas
- [ ] Authentication schemes documented (Bearer JWT, API Key)
- [ ] DTOs decorated with `@ApiProperty()` for schema generation
- [ ] Controllers decorated with `@ApiTags()` for grouping
- [ ] Example requests/responses shown
- [ ] Swagger JSON available at `/api/docs-json` for SDK generation

title: Documentation: Create plugin development guide and contributing docs
body:
## Description
Create comprehensive documentation for developing new security plugins.

## Files to Create
- `docs/plugins.md` — plugin development guide
- `docs/plugin-example.md` — walkthrough of creating a plugin

## Files to Modify
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — add plugin contribution section

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Step-by-step guide to create a new plugin
- [ ] `IRulePlugin` interface fully documented
- [ ] `PluginMetadata` fields explained
- [ ] How to write `analyze()` and `supportsContext()`
- [ ] Testing guide with examples
- [ ] Registration in plugin registry explained
- [ ] Code snippets and best practices
- [ ] Links to existing plugins as reference implementations
